text:
What buyers actually need from AI in operations: trust, not novelty.

I keep hearing the same thing from CIOs and ops leaders:

“We tried automating reporting. Nobody trusted the output.”

The problem isn’t the model. It’s the design.

If the output isn’t source-linked — if people can’t trace
a number back to the ticket, the doc, or the meeting
it came from — they won’t trust it.

Three things that make AI outputs trustworthy in operations:

1. Source evidence attached to every claim
2. Human review step before delivery
3. Fallback path when the system isn’t confident

Trust is the wedge. Not novelty.

#executiveworkflows #aiinoperations #trustworthyai
